name: Sankei Chemical Co., Ltd.
summary: Sankei Chemical Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells plant protection materials for agricultural products in Japan. It offers insecticides, fungicides, pheromone agents, herbicides, spreading agents, soil fumigants, agricultural materials, pest control agents, and others. The company was formerly known as Kagoshima Kagaku Kogyo Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Sankei Chemical Co., Ltd. in January 1962. Sankei Chemical Co., Ltd. was founded in 1918 and is headquartered in Kagoshima, Japan.
